system_objective.trigger: A new client evidence request is submitted or a scheduled compliance review cycle begins
system_objective.output: A reviewed evidence package is delivered to the client with status tracking and an audit trail
system_objective.human_escalation: A compliance analyst reviews missing, conflicting, low-confidence, or high-risk evidence before client delivery

manual_steps: Review whether evidence satisfies the requested controls
Resolve missing, conflicting, or stale files
automated_steps: Create evidence job from intake event
Assemble draft package from available files
milestones: Define request schema, checklist model, and review states
Build intake, storage, and operator dashboard
Implement worker-based package assembly and completeness checks
Add analyst review, exception handling, and audit logging
Add secure client delivery and status tracking
Pilot with one compliance program and tighten rules
